$schema_comment: Invariants the fork must preserve after every upstream pick. The static-scan step ('scripts/08-static-scan.ps1') fails the run if any of these patterns is missing from the post-pick worktree. Use this for fork-specific content that an upstream cherry-pick can silently strip (e.g. take-upstream conflict resolution removing a fork-added warning suppression).

invariants.reason: Fork added C4459 (declaration of 'X' hides class member) suppression because TreatWarningAsError=true and fork-specific code triggers it. Upstream removed C4459 in the ATL/MFC cleanup; a take-upstream resolution drops it and the next build fails. See PR #220 audit (2026-06-04).
